title: Tapping for Mum Rage
subtitle: A five-minute tapping practice for the rage that arrives at the end of a long mothering day
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice for the rage that arrives at the end of a long mothering day. The rage is information; the practice gives it somewhere to go that is not the children. Used in the bathroom, in the car, or behind a closed bedroom door.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s.

practice.whenToUse: Use when the rage at the children is loud, when the body has gone hot, when the next word out of your mouth would be one you regret.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice for mum rage. The rage is real. The body has been carrying it for hours. The script gives the rage somewhere to go that is not the children.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop (repeat x3)
Even though my body is hot with rage at my children right now, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though the day has been long and the rage is sitting on my chest, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I am furious in this moment, I can love them and be furious at the same time, and I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
**Eyebrow:** My body is hot.
**Side of eye:** I want to shout.
**Under eye:** The day has been too long.
**Under nose:** I have been touched and needed all day.
**Chin:** I have nothing left to give.
**Collarbone:** I am tired of being the calm one.
**Under arm:** The rage is not the same thing as not loving them.
**Top of head:** The rage is asking for something to change.
Reframe to positive
**Eyebrow:** I can let the heat leave my body.
**Side of eye:** I can step away for a few minutes.
**Under eye:** The day has been hard, and I am still standing.
**Under nose:** I am allowed to not be touched for ten minutes.
**Chin:** I can let someone else hold the next minute.
**Collarbone:** I can be clear about what I need now.
**Under arm:** My love for them is steady underneath this.
**Top of head:** The rage is information. I can listen to it without acting on it.
Tap the round three times. Then tap the reframe three times.
Where this practice comes from
Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.
